description_long: This is a vintage-style brown hat with a domed crown and a short, upturned brim. The hat features ornate, cream-colored scrollwork embroidery encircling both the crown and the brim, adding a decorative and elegant touch. At the top center of the crown, there is a small, round button or knob, which is also cream-colored and appears to be a decorative accent. The surface of the hat has a slightly rough, matte finish, giving it an aged, textured appearance. The overall shape is symmetrical and the brim is narrow, blending smoothly into the crown. The hat exudes an old-fashioned, formal aesthetic, reminiscent of late 19th to early 20th-century millinery.
description: A vintage brown hat with a domed crown, ornate cream embroidery, and a small decorative button on top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the domed crown, ornate cream embroidery, and the central decorative button clearly.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the continuous scrollwork embroidery and the hat's symmetrical, rounded profile.
description_view_2: Rear view with the decorative band and scrollwork visible, emphasizing the hat's smooth, domed shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the embroidery and the button from a slightly different angle.
